use_count.meaning: Number of times the skill was actively used.

view_count.meaning: Number of times the skill was loaded via skill_view().

patch_count.meaning: Number of times the skill was patched/edited.

last_used_at.meaning: ISO 8601 timestamp of most recent use_count bump.

last_viewed_at.meaning: ISO 8601 timestamp of most recent view_count bump.

last_patched_at.meaning: ISO 8601 timestamp of most recent patch_count bump.
